section.heading: Appropriations under control of Architect of the Capitol

content.p: Appropriations under the control of the Architect of the Capitol shall be available for expenses of advertising and personal and other services.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was classified to section 689 of former Title 31, prior to the enactment of Title 31, Money and Finance, by Pub. L. 97–258, § 1, Sept. 13, 1982, 96 Stat. 877, and then to section 166a–1 of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by Pub. L. 107–217, § 1, Aug. 21, 2002, 116 Stat. 1062.
Section consolidates provisions from the Legislative Branch Appropriation Acts for fiscal years 1930 and 1931.
